  • Method Details

    • base

      public static final CodecManager base()
      Registers the following D/Encoders:
      0. Null
      1. Byte
      2. Short
      3. Integer
      4. Double
      5. Float
      6. Long
      7. Character
      8. String
      9. Void
      10. Boolean
